command: python -c "import os; os.makedirs('data', exist_ok=True); lines=['Summer','','Summer arrives with a passionate brilliance, like a bold brushstroke on the canvas of time, bright and dazzling, quietly and unexpectedly filling every corner of the world.','']; f=open('data/english.txt','w',encoding='utf-8'); f.write(chr(10).join(lines)); f.close(); print('OK')"
